channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ICE considers selling warehouses originally planned for large-scale immigrant detention
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) are exploring the sale of several warehouses purchased earlier this year for over $38 million. These facili...

item.title: Canada and China Strengthen Trade Relations During Ministerial Visit
item.description: Canada is pursuing a strategic expansion of its trade relationship with China, targeting a 50 per cent increase in exports by 2030 while prioritizing economic and national security safeguards. Foreign...

item.title: Whistleblower allegations spark internal turmoil and leadership fallout at KPMG
item.description: The article examines an escalating internal crisis within KPMG, one of the major global consulting firms, following whistleblower allegations connected to its audit division. The controversy centres o...

item.title: How rooftop solar systems act as a financial hedge against rising Meralco electricity bills
item.description: The article explains how installing a rooftop solar and battery system can serve as both a financial strategy and an inflation hedge for Filipino households facing steadily rising electricity costs fr...

item.title: Former federal prosecutor says legal setbacks involving Trump-linked fund could escalate as courts review cases
item.description: A former federal prosecutor has warned that ongoing legal challenges involving President Donald Trump’s $1.776 billion “Anti-Weaponization” fund could worsen as courts continue to intervene in related...

item.title: Government and Private Sector Discuss Plans to Reduce Youth Unemployment and Skills Gap
item.description: For Channels Television Youth Forum 2026, wahala about rising youth unemployment and skills gap don dey main talk. Policymakers, business oga and development experts come dey reason how to tackle Nige...

item.title: Minor Arrested in Ajmer for Allegedly Killing Four Family Members After Months of Planning
item.description: In a disturbing incident reported from Ajmer in Rajasthan, a minor has been accused of killing four members of his own family after allegedly planning the crime over several months. According to polic...

item.title: The decline of spontaneous friendship hangouts in modern life
item.description: The article explores the gradual disappearance of spontaneous, unstructured time spent between friends, arguing that modern life has significantly reduced opportunities for casual socialising. The aut...

item.title: Wizz Air advises UK travellers to arrive three hours early at European airports due to new Entry Exit System border checks
item.description: The UK boss of budget airline Wizz Air has recommended that British holidaymakers arrive at European airports three hours before their return flights to account for potential lengthy queues caused by ...

item.title: Trump criticizes New York Times coverage of Reflecting Pool renovation project
item.description: President Donald Trump reacted strongly on Truth Social to a New York Times article that examined the costs and contracts associated with the renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Wash...

item.title: Jabari Brisport’s salary pledge becomes the focus of a New York Playbook item
item.description: This Politico newsletter item centers on New York State Sen. Jabari Brisport and revisits his long-running effort to align his pay with the median income in Brooklyn. The piece frames Brisport’s salar...

item.title: Davao Region vs Calabarzon in 2026 Palarong Pambansa Secondary Boys’ Basketball Final (Livestream)
item.description: The 2026 Palarong Pambansa secondary boys’ basketball final features a high-stakes showdown between Davao Region and Calabarzon in Agusan del Sur, Philippines. The match is scheduled for Saturday morn...

item.title: Canada announces 26-player World Cup squad led by Alphonso Davies
item.description: Canada has officially unveiled its 26-player squad for the upcoming FIFA World Cup, with Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies named as the headline player. Head coach Jesse Marsch announced the roster f...

item.title: Patient reports cockroach infestation and hygiene concerns at Durban’s King Dinuzulu Hospital
item.description: A Durban patient has raised serious concerns about hygiene standards at King Dinuzulu Hospital, formerly known as King George V Hospital, after alleging a severe cockroach infestation in one of the wa...

item.title: Nigerian community reports over 100 deaths linked to xenophobic violence in South Africa
item.description: Nigerian community leaders for South Africa, under groups like Nigerian Union South Africa (NUSA) and Nigerian Citizens Association South Africa (NICASA), don report say at least 105 Nigerians don los...

item.title: North-Central APC Forum Withdraws Ultimatum and Apologises to Party Chairman Yilwatda
item.description: The North-Central All Progressives Congress (APC) Forum has officially withdrawn its earlier ultimatum demanding the resignation of the party’s National Chairman, Prof. Nentawe Yilwatda. The group had...

item.title: Senate President Praises Tinubu’s Economic Reforms and Development Projects
item.description: The Senate President, Godswill Akpabio, don praise President Bola Tinubu for the bold economic steps wey him don take to stabilize Nigeria’s economy. According to Akpabio, the removal of fuel subsidy ...

item.title: Tinubu says subsidy removal helped Nigeria avoid bankruptcy and boost economic recovery
item.description: President Bola Tinubu tok say the removal of fuel subsidy, even though e cause plenty wahala and litigation, na the move wey save Nigeria from wahala of bankruptcy. During a Sallah celebration with go...

item.title: Local MPPs Request Provincial Support to Prevent Closure of House of Hope Shelter
item.description: Local Members of Provincial Parliament (MPPs) in London are calling on the Ontario government to provide funding to prevent the closure of the House of Hope, a vital shelter for people experiencing ho...

item.title: Proposed US legislation targeting Chinese-linked carmakers could also affect Mercedes-Benz operations
item.description: A bipartisan proposal in the US House of Representatives, known as the Motor Vehicle Modernisation Act of 2026, seeks to restrict the influence of countries deemed adversaries, including China, Russia...
